title: Pyodide Kernel Settings Schema v0
description: Pyodide-specific configuration values. Will be defined in another location in the future.

pyodideUrl.description: The path to the main pyodide.js entry point

disablePyPIFallback.description: Disable the piplite behavior of falling back to https://pypi.org/pypi/

pipliteUrls.description: Paths to PyPI-compatible API endpoints for wheels. If ending in ``all.json``, assumed to be an aggregate, keyed by package name, with relative paths

pipliteIndexUrls.description: URL(s) of package indices to use as a site-wide default, passed as `index_urls` to micropip.install. Relative paths are resolved against the base URL of the JupyterLite deployment. Preferred over `pipliteInstallDefaultOptions.index_urls`.

pipliteInstallDefaultOptions.description: Additional default options to pass to piplite.install (forwarded as kwargs to micropip.install). The `index_urls` key is supported for backwards compatibility; prefer `pipliteIndexUrls` instead.

index_urls.description: URL(s) of package indices to use, passed as `index_urls` to micropip.install. Prefer the top-level `pipliteIndexUrls` key instead.

loadPyodideOptions.description: additional options to provide to `loadPyodide`, see https://pyodide.org/en/stable/usage/api/js-api.html#globalThis.loadPyodide
